figures.caption: Table 5. Detailed results of the on-policy data for reasoning. For AIME and AMC, the results are avg.@32. For the other benchmarks, the results are avg.@8. ∗ denotes that the performance is statistically significant (t-test with p < 0.01).

Table 2. Detailed results of the off-policy data for reasoning. For AIME and AMC, the results are avg.@32. For the other benchmarks, the results are avg.@8. ∗ denotes that the performance is statistically significant (t-test with p < 0.01).
